name: code-toolkit
description: Process-discipline + canon-grounded coding toolkit for Claude Code (+ Codex CLI manifest tracked in lock-step) — 10 skills implementing a Superpowers-style 8-stage workflow (brainstorm → plan → SDD → TDD iron-law → systematic-debugging → code-review → verification → finish-branch) with SessionStart hook auto-injection. Every rule grounded in primary sources (Beck 2002 TDD / Martin 2008 Clean Code / Hunt & Thomas 2019 Pragmatic / Martin 2000-2017 SOLID / Fowler 2018 Refactoring / Feathers 2004 Legacy Code / OWASP ASVS v5.0.0 / 徳丸本 第 2 版 Ch.6) via byte-identical functional copies of `domain-teams:code-team` (drift-gated by `scripts/verify-drift.py`). v0.6.0 introduces 4 plugin-level subagents (`code-toolkit:{implementer, spec-reviewer, code-quality-reviewer, code-reviewer}`) each carrying the 12-rule engineering baseline SSOT-injected from `scripts/_baseline.md`. brainstorming Axis 4 enforces multilingual research (EN + JA minimum) since v0.5.1. Coexists with `domain-teams:code-team` (passive gate entry) and `dev-workflow:{git-memory, complexity-critique, proposal-critique}`; conflicts with `obra/superpowers` resolved via `CODE_TOOLKIT_MODE=off`. 個人開発者向け process-discipline + canon-grounded コーディングツールキット。個人開發者用流程紀律 + 一級書目 grounding 程式開發工具組。
